text: The first scene feels sterile, almost clinical—a bright but empty hallway, silent except for the distant hum of fluorescent lights. My footsteps echo. I notice the fire hose, a symbol of preparedness, but it also quietly suggests possible emergencies—an odd tension between calm and latent anxiety. In the second scene, standing before the colorful R+D display, I feel more alive but also scrutinized. The words on the screen echo my inner mood: exposed, unsure, desiring understanding amidst a confusing world. The vivid graphics and text invite me to reflect on my place in a technological landscape. I feel curiosity, yet a faint existential unease—an inward questioning about my role in this intersection of human and machine.
